classify_error: classify an error message or status code into transient, server, or client error categories
circuit_breaker_can_call: check if a server circuit is closed or half-open to allow a tool call
circuit_breaker_record_failure: record a tool call failure and open the circuit if the failure threshold is exceeded
backoff_strategy_should_retry: determine whether to retry a failed tool call based on error category and attempt count
tool_resolver_resolve: find BM25-ranked alternative tools when a stuck tool call needs a fallback
